seo.title: Get Free Samples in Germany | Verified Offers | TryTreat
seo.description: Discover verified free sample offers from leading brands in Germany. Browse the latest opportunities and claim available samples while supplies last.

faq.question: Are these free samples really free?
faq.answer: Yes, all free samples listed are completely free. You may need to fill out a short form or register on the partner site.

faq.question: How long does delivery take?
faq.answer: Delivery typically takes 2-6 weeks depending on the offer and your location within Germany.

faq.question: Can I request multiple samples?
faq.answer: You can browse and claim different offers. Some may be limited to one per household.
